feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Parallel line merge to main line not allowed
entry.content:
We used the Parallel line for adding a new country. Now we want to merge it with the Main line. After pressing the "Merge" button, we get the message: "The business configuration of your parallel line is not up-to-date with the main line. Please rebase first.".

We have done a successful rebase (incuding manual processing of a customer stagging), then we have done successful "Simulation of Cross-Client Validation" and "Verification of Master Data References", but still it is not up-to-date.

According to documentation

The merge is denied if any of these conditions apply:

  • No cross-client validation report has been initiated.

  • The most recent cross-client validation report is older than one hour.

  • The cross-client validation report contains unresolved errors.

We have none of these things. What are we missing? What else should be checked?

entry.title: APP Close Periods
entry.content: After release 2602, the process for check the period in the ‘Close Periods’ app has become obsolete and is no longer executed.

entry.title: Provision required to change the shift factor and variable depreciation portion
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Provision required to change the shift factor and variable depreciation portion for the entire assets of plant & machinery on every Month before Depreciation in the Tile of Manage Fixed Asset.

entry.title: Accounting document not offsettable with CME 1
entry.content:
I'm currently facing a situation regarding postings with CME 1 for clients.

In our case, we've been using CME 1 to post deposits received from our clients (posted to account 1800000 as a CME reconciliation account, leaving the entry open in the client's account as a special ledger entry).

Now, our client wants to offset a deposit with an invoice. When they go to the "Offset Payments Received" application, the option to offset these items is not available. Is there a configuration setting to modify this?

 

Additionally, and what is most striking, if I go to the "automatic payment management" app it does allow me to access these items, since I have configuration point 101293 with CME 1

I cannot use the automatic payment management app because I have to apply the difference between the deposit and the invoice to the customer's account and leave it pending. Its the reason

Is this about the special ledger transaction type? Does it mean that all entries that are "Z" cannot be offset?

Thank for your help!!

entry.title: Message no. TPM_TGR098
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team:
We need to create a new valuation area to activate General Ledger 3L, but the system won’t let us activate this area. Please review the attached file.
We understand how this works in SAP Private, but not in Public; thank you for your explanations.
Giovanny Barona


--- Steps to Reproduce ---

Enter the app S_KP6_83000022 on Customizing system and Try activate the product type IPA on security.



*Note To SAP:
I give approval for SAP Support to use the Steps to Reproduce I have provided in this workflow, while connected to my impacted non-production environments, even if the steps result in a change being made and my approval remains valid until the issue is resolved, unless I inform SAP Support otherwise.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: EML Create Business Partner Problem - The issue has been resolved
entry.content:
I'm trying to create a Business Partner using EML (Entity Manipulation Language) with the standard interface view i_businesspartnertp_3 In SAP S4Hana Public Cloud.

The implementation executes without any runtime errors, and both FAILED and FAILED_COMMIT structures are initial. However, the Business Partner is not created in the system.

CLASS zcl_businessobject DEFINITION
PUBLIC
FINAL
CREATE PUBLIC .

PUBLIC SECTION.

INTERFACES if_oo_adt_classrun .
PROTECTED SECTION.
PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.




CLASS zcl_businessobject IMPLEMENTATION.


METHOD if_oo_adt_classrun~main.


DATA create_partner TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE i_businesspartnertp_3.
create_partner = VALUE #( (
%cid = 'bp1'
businesspartnercategory = '1'
%control-businesspartnercategory = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
lastname = 'Test_BP5'
%control-lastname = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
) ).
MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_businesspartnertp_3
ENTITY businesspartner
CREATE FROM create_partner
CREATE BY \_businesspartneraddress
FIELDS ( country cityname ) WITH VALUE #( (
%cid_ref = 'bp1'
%target = VALUE #(
(
%cid = 'bp1_1'
country = 'IN'
cityname = 'Bangalore'
)
)
) )
MAPPED DATA(mapped)
REPORTED DATA(reported)
FAILED DATA(failed).
COMMIT ENTITIES
RESPONSE OF i_businesspartnertp_3
FAILED DATA(failed_commit)
REPORTED DATA(reported_commit).
IF failed_commit IS NOT INITIAL.
out->write( |Error| ).
ELSE.
out->write( |Sucess.| ).
ENDIF.


ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.


Any guidance on why the entity is not created despite no reported errors would be appreciated.

Best regards

entry.title: Does project release workflow impact data migration of projects
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am doing the data migration of legacy projects, and I already active a workflow for project release. I just wandering if the workflow will impact the data migration of legacy projects, for example, some specific status of project will trigger workflow during data migration, then interrupt it? Thanks

B,R

entry.title: Enterprise Search Project ... Project manager + WBSs + project planning app
entry.content:
Raised a few months ago already with our consultant but no traction so far so and likely anyway pointing to SAP so hereby hopefully somebody here can help with this.

Our project managers in Enterprise search do not find their project while Finance is able to. Was surprised by this because we would expect project managers to be able to find in enterprise search their own ... Projects. More companies observe this issue or flaw in our business role setup we can easily fix ourselves?

Also no hit in Enterprise search when searching for 

  • Specific WBS (now needs multiple clicks: enterprise search project > click project > project planning > open WBS)
  • Project Planning App

hope we're just overlooking something and this is a quick win 😉

entry.title: Reversing a Completed Outbound Delivery in EWM: How to Return Stock to Its Original Bin?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm trying to understand the logic behind reversing a completed outbound delivery within the 3BS scope item. The process involves two steps, and I have a question regarding the second one.

Step 1 – Reverse the Post Goods Issue (PGI)
This step is clear and logical. After reversing the PGI, the stock is returned to the GI-AREA, which makes sense.

Step 2 – Cancel the Picking or better named Releasing the Stock.
This is where I'm running into confusion, both technically and logically.

From a technical standpoint, the reversal process is not explicitly documented within scope item 3BS, as it does not reference a picking task reversal, instead, it only describes a stock release. It was through KBA 3638009 – "How to Cancel the Picking of Stock in Manage Outbound Delivery Orders" that I found this is actually how the process is "cancelled", even though it is not a true cancellation, since it's only a stock release.

My question:
After successfully reversing the PGI and releasing the picked stock, the inventory remains in the GI-AREA, why?. Is there a way to automatically move it back to its original source bin, or is a manual warehouse task required?

Any guidance or clarification would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Direct GR into Special Stock O for Different Vendor
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a business scenario in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Cloud regarding subcontracting and direct delivery:

We would like to purchase raw materials from Vendor A, but instead of receiving them into our own plant stock, we want the goods to be delivered directly to Vendor B (subcontractor), and posted into special stock O (subcontracting stock) under Vendor B.

Our expectation is:

  • Create a purchase order to Vendor A 
  • Upon goods receipt, directly post the stock into special stock O for Vendor B
  • Later, use this stock for subcontracting consumption when receiving finished goods from Vendor B

Based on the above, we would like to clarify:

  1. Is it possible in standard S/4HANA Cloud to post goods receipt from Vendor A directly into special stock O for a different vendor (Vendor B)?
  2. If yes, what is the correct configuration or process ?
  3. If not, is the only supported approach to first receive into our own stock and then transfer to subcontracting stock via movement 541? 
  4. Alternatively, are there any other recommended approaches or best practices for this scenario?

Any guidance or best practice would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.content:
How to map a classic Goods Receipt process with integrated Quality Inspection and Deconsolidation? 

or

How to configure the Multi Stage process in Warehouse Management?

entry.title: TRM: DBT_B008 Planned outflow unexpected amount
entry.content:
Hello, SAP,

 

We have a concern with TRXN: PHONE_NUMBER1 - Cocode: LU19 (Local currency: EUR), related to Investment product type. 

 

Nominal amount: 8M USD 

Start date of the contract was December 30,DIGITS wherein the FX Rate on that day for USD/EUR is 0.ZIPCODE

Supposedly, the contract is until DIGITS. However, an early repayment was processed last June 24, DIGITS with FX rate = 0.ZIPCODE 

However, a derived business transaction DBT_B008 was posted. 

Per checking, DBT_B008 is supposed to output amount with the difference of the Local currency from the initial posting to the local currency of final payment. 

Upon computation, pls refer to attached file, the amount posted in DBT_B008 is not expected.

 

However, that seems not the expected outcome. 

 

Please see attach


--- Steps to Reproduce ---

1 Manage Financial transactions app 

Trxn number: PHONE_NUMBER1 

LU19 

 

2 Check in Treasury posting journal app 



--- Issue Date (UTC) ---
DIGITS-03-08 16:58:42 - DIGITS-03-08 16:58:42

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Valuation Category Enable Issue
entry.content:
Hi,

We are enabling batch costing. While extend the material to some plants we missed to select the field valuation type. So we issued the stock and closed all the open documents. But system not allow to activate showing error "Stock already exist"

The same scenario I tried in the Customizing server for testing purpose.

entry.title: Statistical Condition Type Not Appearing In Billing Document XML In Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

Set sales pricing procedures in SAP S/4 hana Public Cloud and in that there are multiple Statistical condition types which are not coming in Billing document XML which required to print on output

Could you please guide how to fix this issue or provide an solution.

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: How to show custom field from app: supplier invoice to app: manage supplier line item
entry.content:
I would like to create a custom field in the header section of the Create Supplier Invoice app.

After posting the supplier invoice, I would like this field to be visible in the Manage Supplier Line Items app.

Could you please confirm whether this is possible in SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition)?

entry.title: Intercompany return process steps and scope item
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I would like to know the process steps for intercompany return process in S/4 HANA public cloud.

I read one thread in which mentioned to use Scope item BKP.I am not sure if this is the correct scope item.

But details are not mentioned like which PO document type should be used, master data set-up for IC partners etc.

Can you please share the details. Thanks in Advance.

Thanks

Pavan

entry.title: Workflow for Park &app; Approve before Payment Posting
entry.content: Is there any workflow for Park & Approve before Payment Posting is done? Can we have Maker & checker for Payment rejection & Payment approval for Payment entries? We require this for normal payments not for down payment requests.

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud Public – Display account assignment description in PO factsheet (My Inbox)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am working on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and I have a question regarding Purchase Order approval via My Inbox.

In the approval process, when opening a Purchase Order from the My Inbox app (factsheet view), at item level I can see the account assignment (e.g. Cost Center / WBS element), but only the code is displayed.

My requirement is to display the description (e.g. Cost Center name or WBS description) in addition to or instead of the code, directly in the PO factsheet accessed from My Inbox.

Constraints:

  • S/4HANA Cloud Public (clean core)

  • Standard factsheet UI (no key user adaptation available in this context)

  • The field is standard (account assignment), not a custom field

Any guidance or experience would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Mexico Deferred Tax Procedure
entry.content:
In Mexico, business needs to transfer deferred tax. 
Based on our understanding, when the invoice is cleared, then the system can transfer deferred tax. 
However, the invoice is cleared, we cannot transfer deferred tax until the bank clearing GL account is cleared. 
the process is:
1.customer invoice
2.Manage payment advice
3.manage bank statement (this step will clear the invoice, but the bank clearing GL account will not be cleared.)
4.Clear bank clearing GL account. (The transfer defer tax will use this document posting date for exchange rate, if the bank statement posting date is different from this clearing date, it will case some troubles. we want to use the bank statement posting date as exchange rate date.)
5.Transfer deferred tax
our question is
can we ignore the step 4. clear bank clearing GL account? or how can we keep the posting date is same between step 3 and step 4?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
